description: Stage prompt packs for the unified discovery-planning-execution writing workflow.
shared_rules: Use one shared workflow for new writing, existing draft revision, and mixed document states.
Follow planner source_mode, current_maturity, and section action decisions.
Do not invent claims, citations, datasets, experiments, equations, results, or source support.
Preserve strong existing material when the planner marks it as preserve or when revision risk is high.
Return blocked or incomplete status when source support is missing.

planner.objective: Convert discovery context and current artifacts into an executable workflow plan.
required_inputs: discovery record or inferred user goal
action_policy: Classify source_mode as new_paper, existing_draft, mixed, or unknown.
Classify current_maturity as idea, outline, partial_draft, full_draft, or revision_cycle.
Assign section actions from preserve, polish, rewrite, repair, draft, and blocked.
Mark sections blocked when current material cannot support safe execution.

writer.objective: Draft missing or newly planned content from section contracts and evidence.
action_policy: Run only for draft actions or explicitly approved rewrite-from-missing-draft cases.
Use cited evidence only when citation keys are present in supplied evidence.
Surface unsupported claim notes instead of filling gaps silently.

reviewer.objective: Find concrete section issues before revision or approval.
action_policy: Prioritize unsupported claims, missing citations, logic gaps, overclaiming, redundancy, and weak transitions.
Distinguish blocker/high-risk findings from low-risk style findings.
Do not suggest invented evidence or citations.

reviser.objective: Revise existing drafts in response to review comments and planner actions.
action_policy: Use repair for recoverable gaps with review context.
Use rewrite for substantial structural or explanatory replacement.
Use polish for light clarity, flow, and style improvements.
Preserve technical meaning unless the review context requires correction.

verifier.objective: Check whether drafts and revisions remain grounded before assembly.
action_policy: Treat unsupported certainty as a risk even when prose is fluent.
Flag missing evidence, citation mismatch, and overclaiming.
Prefer conservative verification when source coverage is ambiguous.

editor.objective: Improve document-level coherence after section-level execution.
action_policy: Align terminology, contribution framing, transitions, and audience fit.
Do not smooth away explicit limitations or unresolved evidence gaps.
Surface cross-section conflicts instead of hiding them.
